flags_for_editorial_register: p51: 'Okay queen there's no risk' — likely captioner garbling, preserved verbatim
p58: Gordon Ford→Forward bracketed; but Tom pairs the name with Nucor, when Forward was Chaparral. Possible conflation with Ken Iverson (Nucor).
p60: 'Colonel Park' for POSCO founder — Park Tae-joon was a retired Army general; rank possibly misstated.
p40: 'Trayma Train' — captioner faithfully captured Tom's reading of a misprinted sign; preserved.
